title: What 10 30 stuff has been confirmed fake
display_title: What 10 30 stuff has been confirmed fake
wikitext:
[]: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Jan 26, 2018 12:52 pm So far the only things we have that have been officially released are the Next Episode Preview at the end of Q, Until You Come to Me, and some art. Can anyone else confirm if things like Gendo projecting an AT Field from his hand are fake?

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jan 26, 2018 1:18 pm Short answer: Nothing is confirmed about 3.0 + 1.0. We know it will end Shinji's emotional journey and that based on the lantern Anno drew for a festival last summer there will be some new iteration of Evangelion Unit 02 but that's it. Aside from that nothing is official. Absolutely nothing. We can guess which characters will be central to the story ( I figure the movie will primarily revolve around Shinji's relationships with Rei & Mistao & the Asuka FanClub is going to be disappointed and given more fuel for their petulance BUT I could very easily be completely off track and wrong ) & we can hypothesize what is going to occur but nothing is confirmed. Studio Khara has complete control over the workflow of these movies so there aren't going to be leaks or gossipy reveals from the staff unless the studio approves of it. If something is "revealed" on a Reddit thread or by a Twitter account without genuine verification from the official Khara social media accounts don't confirm it as anything but false. Khara can keep a secret. The theatrical premiere of 3.0 is a testament to that.

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 26, 2018 2:59 pm AdamMalkobitch wrote: Gendo projecting an AT Field from his hand

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Jan 26, 2018 3:32 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Do you mean like this? for size  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by Lennik » Sun Jan 28, 2018 9:29 pm AdamMalkobitch wrote: Holy tits. I knew that Gendo saved Shinji in that timeline, but I had no idea he did it like that.

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 29, 2018 12:51 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: We can guess which characters will be central to the story ( I figure the movie will primarily revolve around Shinji's relationships with Rei & Mistao & the Asuka FanClub is going to be disappointed and given more fuel for their petulance BUT I could very easily be completely off track and wrong ) & we can hypothesize what is going to occur but nothing is confirmed.

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by TheChosenJuan » Wed Jan 31, 2018 5:27 am Haven't the reboots be also very close to the original series and movies? So must be at least some sort of continuation of the pursuit of the last Impact and Gendo getting what he wants, since he basically 'outsmarted' the Dead Sea Scrolls guys or whatever they were. Probably one of those FAR things. However I'm not so keen on the Unit 02 rebuild, because the thing self-destructed, didn't it? I thought self destruction had the concept of something not workig afterwards.

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jan 31, 2018 6:13 am TheChosenJuan wrote: Haven't the reboots be also very close to the original series and movies?

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 31, 2018 9:01 am ∆ Some observations I don't agree with, but in general good points were made. I also believe Rebuild (which I will keep calling it lol) is doimg its own thing. I just don't agree that Shinji is more similar to Gendo now or that miscommunication isn't a theme anymore (3.0's plot was pretty much a result if miscommunication).

[]: Re: What 1.0 + 3.0 stuff has been confirmed fake?             Quote Post by barnett » Wed Jan 31, 2018 9:19 am That post on rpg.net is really good, definitely worth reading, especially for NTE detractors.
